description: Style note If you want a bag that is funky, stylish, super cool and comfortable to carry around all day, check out this black and grey Brasilia backpack from nike. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with your friends. A stunningly good looking bag, with loads of space, it will become your best buddy in no time. Be prepared to be swept off your feet by this awesome backpack! Product Details Nylon lining for increased durability with two main zippered compartments to accommodate all your useful items One roomy zippered compartment and one other zippered compartment with a detailed organizer for storing essentials has a Nike swoosh printed on the front and graphic print on the sides Padded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuries Ergonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortably Nike Swoosh on strap and a haul loop for handling ease Branding on straps and branded zippers and sliders for easy use Material and Care 80% polyester and 20% nylon only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry do not iron Size Height: 50 cm Width: 33 cm Depth: 20 cm
